cards.title: Navigating AI in Project Management: A Comparison with Racing ...
tldr: **The article explores integrating AI into project management, drawing parallels with racing co-pilots and driverless cars.**
It discusses different levels of AI autonomy and their implications for project managers.
The piece likely examines how AI can augment human capabilities in project delivery and decision-making.

cards.title: Project Tracking Software - Tail AI
tldr: **Tail AI offers intelligent project tracking software with real-time progress monitoring and portfolio-wide visibility.**
The platform provides detailed project summaries, task breakdowns, built-in time tracking, and budget monitoring.
It helps teams organize projects, track profitability, and ensure on-time, on-budget delivery through collaboration tools.

cards.title: Project Reporting & Analytics - Tail AI
tldr: **Tail AI offers data-driven reporting and analytics for transforming project data into actionable insights.**

cards.title: Insights from the Latest Global Study on the AI-Powered Project ...
tldr: **Presents insights from a global study on the impact and application of AI in project management.**
Examines how artificial intelligence is transforming traditional project management practices and methodologies.
Covers key trends and findings regarding AI's role in enhancing project delivery and decision-making.

cards.title: AI Project Portfolio Management in 2026: What PMO Leaders Must ...
tldr: **Gartner's "Predicts 2026" report outlines five key actions for PMO leaders to embrace AI in portfolio management.**
Data readiness, financial discipline, and appropriate AI skills are essential for PMOs to derive real value from AI.
Low confidence in data governance (14% of IT leaders) presents a significant challenge for PMOs adopting AI.

cards.title: AI in Construction: Tools and Use Cases | Microsoft Copilot
tldr: **Microsoft Copilot explores AI tools and use cases specifically for the construction industry.**
It details how AI can enhance efficiency and decision-making across construction projects.

cards.title: Moltbook Monitoring by YouScan: Track AI Agent Conversations
tldr: **YouScan's Moltbook monitoring tracks AI bot conversations to detect brand reputation threats and security risks.**
It identifies negative brand mentions, fake product claims, prompt injection attempts, and crypto scam schemes.
The service helps organizations protect brand safety and conduct security research, relevant for proactive risk identification.

cards.title: How AI Improves Global Team Collaboration: 6 Use Cases ... - Deel
tldr: AI is transforming global team collaboration by addressing challenges like time zones and language barriers.

cards.title: AgentCost – Track, control, and optimize your AI spending (MIT)
tldr: **AgentCost helps organizations track, control, and optimize spending on AI agents and large language models.**
It offers a real-time dashboard, cost forecasting, and model optimization for 42 AI models.
The tool addresses managing actual AI agent costs at scale, relevant for project budgeting and resource allocation.

cards.title: Federal Technology Lifecycle Management Adopts AI & Automation
tldr: **Federal agencies are leveraging AI and automation to enhance technology lifecycle management.**
These technologies support the management of hardware, software, and networks amid staff reductions.

cards.title: Asana Posts 9% Revenue Growth, But Is Its AI Project Management ...

tldr: **Power Automate enables analysts to rapidly automate the sending of critical alert emails based on data insights.**

This combined approach helps analysts detect anomalies and communicate urgent information more efficiently, relevant for project oversight.

tldr: **KPMG NZ highlights how AI is revolutionizing risk management practices across various sectors.**
AI enhances capabilities for identifying, assessing, and mitigating complex risks more effectively.
